progress_summary: Flag audit run: fixed skills.capability.checkpoint-protocol gate — [id].astro was calling isCapabilityEnabled("oc-checkpoint-protocol") which looked up a nonexistent flag name, causing the gate to always return true. Also discovered site/src/lib/flags/registry.ts was missing (regenerated via gen-flags). 9 intentional placeholder orphan flags noted but left in place.
next_actions: CI validates: vitest, astro check, site build, Playwright e2e.
Merge PR when green. No deploy needed — site build regenerates registry.ts automatically.

last_run.notes: WARNs are all pre-existing environment issues (site/node_modules not installed in this container). Change itself is a 1-line string fix with no anti-patterns.
